summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of product-specific theme colors. Verified all 7 products have themed dashboards with full-bleed backgrounds covering header, sidebar, and main content area. RetailPro (green), UniTxt (amber), Expenses (red), Loyalty (pink), Inventory (blue), KwikPay (emerald), and Invoicing (indigo) themes are all working correctly with good text contrast (white text on colored backgrounds).

integration_issues.issue: Session expires frequently when navigating directly to product URLs (e.g., /invoicing, /inventory) requiring re-login

context_for_next_testing_agent: Product theming fully verified. All 7 products (RetailPro, UniTxt, Expenses, Loyalty, Inventory, KwikPay, Invoicing) have unique theme colors applied to entire dashboard (header, sidebar, background). PRODUCT_THEMES config in WebSidebarLayout.tsx defines colors, getProductTheme function detects product from URL segments. ProductDashboard.tsx implements glass-morphism cards with transparent backgrounds and white text for contrast.

RetailPro.notes: Header, sidebar, and background all themed green

UniTxt.notes: Full amber theme applied with white text

Inventory.notes: Blue theme applied to header and sidebar

Invoicing.notes: Purple/indigo theme visible on sidebar and header

theme_implementation_details.theme_detection: getProductTheme() function detects product from URL segments
theme_implementation_details.styling_approach: Full-bleed colored background with glass-morphism cards (transparent backgrounds)
theme_implementation_details.contrast_solution: White text (#FFFFFF) on colored backgrounds with rgba overlays
